basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates below 35 years who have Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics are eligible to apply for this Research Associate vacancy. The email application process for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 20 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply via email through the direc

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at JNCASR is 20-05-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Research Associate position is a Ph.D. in Theoretical Physics. Candidates must possess this qualification to be considered for the role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years. There might be age relaxations for certain categories as per government norms, which can be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate position will receive a salary of Rs.58,000 plus 30% HRA per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment must be submitted via email. You need to send your resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Research Associate recruitment at JNCASR. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Research Associate post announced by Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR).

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at JNCASR is a contractual job. The appointment will be on a contract basis for a specified period.

faq.question: Q9. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the vacancy.
